records.question: What is the percentage of carcinogenic molecules in triple type bonds?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CAST(COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T2.label = '+' THEN T2.molecule_id ELSE NULL END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(DISTINCT T2.molecule_id) FROM atom AS T1 INNER JOIN molecule AS T2 ON T1.molecule_id = T2.molecule_id INNER JOIN bond AS T3 ON T2.molecule_id = T3.molecule_id WHERE T3.bond_type = '#'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN b.bond_type = '#' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100.0 / COUNT(b.bond_id) FROM bond b INNER JOIN atom a ON b.molecule_id = a.molecule_id INNER JOIN molecule m ON a.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE m.label = '+'
records.alt_pred: SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN m.label = '+' THEN m.molecule_id END) * 100.0 / COUNT(DISTINCT m.molecule_id)) FROM bond AS b JOIN molecule AS m ON b.molecule_id = m.molecule_id WHERE b.bond_type = '#'

records.question: Among the male patients who have a normal level of white blood cells, how many of them have an abnormal fibrinogen level?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.FG <= 150 OR T2.FG >= 450 AND T2.WBC > 3.5 AND T2.WBC < 9.0 AND T1.SEX = 'M'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT L.ID) FROM Patient P INNER JOIN Laboratory L ON P.ID = L.ID WHERE P.SEX = 'M' AND L.WBC > 3.5 AND L.WBC < 9.0 AND (L.FG <= 150 OR L.FG >= 450)
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT Patient.ID) FROM Patient JOIN Laboratory ON Patient.ID = Laboratory.ID WHERE Patient.SEX = 'M' AND `WBC` > 3.5 AND `WBC` < 9.0 AND (`FG` <= 150 OR `FG` >= 450)

records.question: How many patients with an Ig G higher than normal?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID INNER JOIN Examination AS T3 ON T3.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.IGG >= 2000
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGG >= 2000
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT ID) FROM Laboratory WHERE IGG >= 2000

records.question: Among the patients who has a normal level of anti-centromere and a normal level of anti-SSB, how many of them are male?
records.gold_sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CENTROMEA IN ('negative', '0') AND T2.SSB IN ('negative', '0') AND T1.SEX = 'M'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT P.ID) FROM Patient P JOIN Examination E ON P.ID = E.ID WHERE E.CENTROMEA IN ('-', '+-') AND E.SSB IN ('-', '+-') AND P.SEX = 'M'
records.alt_pred: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.CENTROMEA IN ('-', '+-') AND T2.SSB IN ('-', '+-') AND T1.SEX = 'M'

records.question: Did Maya Mclean attend the 'Women's Soccer' event?
records.gold_sql: SELECT CASE WHEN T3.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer' THEN 'YES' END AS result FROM member AS T1 INNER JOIN attendance AS T2 ON T1.member_id = T2.link_to_member INNER JOIN event AS T3 ON T2.link_to_event = T3.event_id WHERE T1.first_name = 'Maya' AND T1.last_name = 'Mclean'
records.baseline_pred: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 AS attended FROM attendance AS a JOIN member AS m ON a.link_to_member = m.member_id JOIN event AS e ON a.link_to_event = e.event_id WHERE m.first_name = 'Maya' AND m.last_name = 'Mclean' AND e.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
records.alt_pred: SELECT event.event_name FROM member INNER JOIN attendance ON member.member_id = attendance.link_to_member INNER JOIN event ON attendance.link_to_event = event.event_id WHERE member.first_name = 'Maya' AND member.last_name = 'Mclean' AND event.event_name = 'Women''s Soccer'
